ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (F, M, U, O) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "became_member_on" TEXT /* Date the customer became a member */,
  "member_since_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the customer has been a member */,
  "person_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer's personal record */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase made by the customer */,
  "lifetime_value" REAL /* Lifetime value of the customer */,
  "opt_in_marketing" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the customer has opted in for marketing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES gender_categories ("gender_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_categories" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender category */,
  "gender_code" TEXT /* Code representing the gender (F, M, U, O) */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Description of the gender category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Range of income (e.g., 0-50000, 50001-100000) */,
  "income_description" TEXT /* Description of the income bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of age (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  "age_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership duration category */,
  "duration_range" TEXT /* Range of membership duration in days (e.g., 0-365, 366-730) */,
  "duration_description" TEXT /* Description of the membership duration category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "became_member_on" TEXT /* Date the customer became a member */,
  "member_since_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the customer has been a member */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date of next membership renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_membership_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender category */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income bracket */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer (e.g., high school, bachelor's, master's) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_demographics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_demographics_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_demographics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES gender_categories ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, refund) */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the customer (e.g., sports, technology) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Preferences of the customer (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "preferred_contact_time" TEXT /* Preferred time for contact (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., website visit, app usage) */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score (1-10) */,
  "engagement_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which engagement occurred (e.g., email, social media) */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign associated with the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_engagement_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
